key_positions: Aim to peak carbon dioxide emissions before 2030 and achieve carbon neutrality before 2060.
Focus on large-scale expansion of wind and solar capacity as part of the energy transition.
Emphasis on 'common but differentiated responsibilities' (CBDR) for developing nations.
red_lines: Opposes any measures that infringe on national development rights for emerging economies.
Rejects attempts to impose strict emission caps that do not account for historical emissions of developed countries.
